name: vscode-extensions
description: Monorepo for VS Code extensions maintained by Karolis Mauragas.

scripts.clean: node -e "for (const path of ['out', 'extensions/git-branches-panel/out']) { require('fs').rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true }); }"
scripts.build:git-branches-panel: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('extensions/git-branches-panel/out', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p ./extensions/git-branches-panel/tsconfig.json
scripts.test:coverage:git-branches-panel: npm run build:git-branches-panel && c8 --reporter=text --all --include='extensions/git-branches-panel/out/**/*.js' node --test extensions/git-branches-panel/test
